Tell me about devstore
Devstore is a centralized library where Ravjit Singh stores and manages code files from his various projects, making them accessible to others.
Great now email this to "juthabanda@gmail.com" with subject "devstore"
<|tool_call|>send Your email about devstore has been sent to juthabanda@gmail.com.
Tell me about files in devstore
Files from Devstore refer to assets name from Devstore.
Tell me more about them

<|tool_call|>querySupabase It seems that Devstore has a collection of files related to various projects, including web development, app development, and more. Some of the files include a Devstore feature roadmap, a Termux APK, and standalone files for projects like rmusic, Skillmax, and Rchat. These files are stored in a centralized library, making it easy to access and manage them.
Tell me about professionals in service linkup , name them too

<|tool Based on the data, it appears that Service Linkup has three professionals listed:

1. Ravjit Singh - a full-stack developer with 4 years of experience, based in Chandigarh.
2. Aditya Kumar - a full-stack developer with 4 years of experience, also based in Chandigarh.
3. Vipin Kumar - a video editor and script writer with 1 year of experience, based in Panchkula.

These professionals have been verified and have their own profiles on Service Linkup, including their contact information, experience, and portfolio.
Tell me complete info about ravjit singh

<|tool Based on the data, Ravjit Singh is a full-stack developer with 4 years of experience, based in Chandigarh. He has a verified profile on Service Linkup, with a bio that mentions his ability to bring ideas into reality. His contact information includes an email address, phone number, and a base price for his services, which is "Contact for price". He has a rating of 0 and has been verified as a professional on the platform. Additionally, he has a portfolio that includes links to his work, which can be accessed through Google Drive.
